data.title: US has over 190 million suffering from Chronic Venous Disease (CVD), with over 50 million having Chronic Venous Insufficiency (CVI). CVD is more prevalent than cardiovascular diseases and diabetes combined. Underestimation, underdiagnosis, and undertreatment are key issues.
data.description: Beaufort, South Carolina – A recent report released by THE SAGE GROUP has provided data on the prevalence and incidence of Chronic Venous Disease (CVD) from 2020 to 2040. According to the report, CVD impacts 1.5 times the number of individuals affected by all cardiovascular diseases combined and five times more than those with diabetes. The report emphasizes that CVD is among the most common chronic illnesses; yet, it is often underestimated, underdiagnosed, and undertreated. Mary L. Yost, President of THE SAGE GROUP, highlighted the significance of addressing CVD, which encompasses a range of medical conditions.

data.title: Emily Windsor nominated for Legal 500 Property and Housing Junior of the Year Award at the Legal 500 Bar Awards 2025.
data.description: In London on July 18, 2025, Emily Windsor from Falcon Chambers received a nomination for the Property and Housing Junior of the Year at the Legal 500 Bar Awards 2025. This prestigious award acknowledges outstanding performance within the legal sector in the UK. Emily Windsor has been shortlisted based on her exceptional client service and expertise in the field.

data.title: MEI Pharma launches $100 million Litecoin treasury program with Charlie Lee on board, causing stock to spike before correcting.
data.description: MEI Pharma (NASDAQ: MEIP) has initiated a $100 million Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) treasury program in collaboration with Titan Partners Group and GSR, a crypto investment firm. As a part of this venture, Charlie Lee, the founder of Litecoin, has been appointed to MEI's Board of Directors. The Litecoin Foundation has also made an investment in MEI as part of this initiative. The company's stock experienced a substantial increase from $4.20 to $11.45 post this announcement, later retracing to $6.00 due to market volatility stemming from a significant shift in strategy. The decision to bring in Litecoin's stable, low-cost, and consistent performance over the past 14 years played a key role in this development.

data.title: Oshkosh Corp (NYSE: OSK) to reveal Q2 2025 earnings on August 1; live webcast at 8:30 am EDT. Investors can access at investors.oshkoshcorp.com.
data.description: Oshkosh Corporation, a prominent manufacturer of specialized vehicles and equipment traded on NYSE under OSK, is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on Friday, August 1, 2025. The disclosure will take place via a live webcast starting at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. For those interested, the webcast can be accessed at investors.oshkoshcorp.com about 15 minutes before the start time. Presentation slides for the webcast will also be posted on the website on the morning of August 1.

data.title: Digi International (NASDAQ: DGII) to release Q3 2025 earnings on August 6 at 4:00pm ET; conference call at 5:00pm ET. CEO and CFO to host.
data.description: Digi International® Inc. (NASDAQ: DGII) is set to announce its financial performance for the third fiscal quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, August 6, after the market closes at around 4:00 p.m. ET. Following this, CEO Ron Konezny and CFO Jamie Loch will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to provide a brief overview of the results, field questions, and give insights. Participants are encouraged to pre-register for the call to secure their dial-in number and passcode.

data.title: Dave Portnoy regrets losing millions in XRP after recent surge, admitting past mistake with Bitcoin.
data.description: The founder of Barstool Sports recently disclosed his mishap with XRP during a time when the cryptocurrency reached an all-time high this week. This comes after he previously acknowledged making a mistake with Bitcoin in the past.

data.title: Panmnesia unveils new AI infrastructure with supercluster architecture incorporating NVLink, UALink, HBM via CXL.
data.description: A technical report titled “Compute Can’t Handle the Truth: Why Communication Tax Prioritizes Memory and Interconnects in Modern AI Infrastructure” has been issued by Panmnesia in Daejeon, South Korea. The report discusses the challenges in current AI infrastructure when dealing with modern AI models. It focuses on the significance of memory and interconnect technologies like Compute Express Link (CXL), NVLink, Ultra Accelerator Link (UALink), and High Bandwidth Memory. The report highlights the growing importance of these technologies in addressing the limitations faced by AI systems.
